sector.name: NBFC
sector.description: NBFCs recovering with secured growth and lower credit costs

companies: Cholamandalam Investment and Finance Company Ltd

fyPerformance: AUM crossed the ₹5 lakh Cr milestone and stood around ₹5,10,000 Cr, up 22%
Q4FY26 AUM addition stood around ₹25,500 Cr
Q4FY26 loans booked stood at 12.9 Mn, while new customers added stood at 3.93 Mn
GNPA stood at 101 bps, NNPA stood at 41 bps and provision coverage stood at 60%
Q4FY26 ROA stood around 5%, while ROE stood at 20%
highlights: Growth was broad-based across businesses
Gold loan portfolio grew 115% and now contributes 3.5% of overall AUM
Management expects gold loans to move towards around 5% of AUM in FY27
MSME growth was muted due to proactive risk actions, with recovery expected after June 2026
Captive 2W / 3W book is expected to run down below ₹1,500 Cr by September 2026
Management expects significant AI deployment across revenue, cost, underwriting and controllership
Bajaj Finance Ltd.quote: "Bajaj Finance is outperforming the sector on scale, customer franchise, profitability, credit quality and execution consistency."

Cholamandalam Investment and Finance Com.quote: "Chola is outperforming the sector on diversified growth, vehicle finance franchise, LAP profitability, new product scale-up and balance sheet strength."
